---
title: "detail_tables"
author: "ID_234731"
date: "2026-04-15"
output:
  word_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r packages, include = F}
library(dplyr)
library (tidyverse) 
library(ggplot2)
library(haven)
library(zoo)
library(stargazer)
library(corrplot)
library(psych)
library(modelsummary)
library(rdrobust)
library(rddtools)
library(fixest)
library(purrr)
library(gt)
library(sandwich)
library(lmtest)
library(kableExtra)
library(flextable)
library(officer)
```

```{r load data, include = F}

cog_test_sgl <- readRDS("[...] Master Thesis/Masterthesis/cog_test_sgl.rds")

cog_test_svrl <- readRDS("[...] Master Thesis/Masterthesis/cog_test_svrl.rds")

```


## Comparing Models for SRA: Retirement on Cognition

```{r prep}

df <- cog_test_sgl %>% select(result_ant, result_sdt, long_retired, eligible_sra, eligible_early)


# OLS
ols_test1 <- lm(result_ant ~ long_retired, data = df) #+ X + controls ?
ols_test2 <- lm(result_sdt ~ long_retired, data = df)

# Reduced form
rf_test1 <- lm(result_ant ~ eligible_sra, data = df)
rf_test2 <- lm(result_sdt ~ eligible_sra, data = df)

# First stage
first_stage <- lm(long_retired ~ eligible_sra, data = df)
df <- df[rownames(first_stage$model), ]
df$D_hat <- predict(first_stage)


# second stage
iv_test1 <- lm(result_ant ~ D_hat, data = df)
iv_test2 <- lm(result_sdt ~ D_hat, data = df)


vcov_list <- list(
  vcovHC(ols_test1, type = "HC1"),
  vcovHC(ols_test2, type = "HC1"),
  vcovHC(rf_test1, type = "HC1"),
  vcovHC(rf_test2, type = "HC1"),
  vcovHC(iv_test1, type = "HC1"),
  vcovHC(iv_test2, type = "HC1")
)
```

```{r coeff}
# kleibergen paap
fs_robust <- coeftest(first_stage, vcov = vcovHC(first_stage, type="HC1"))

beta_z <- fs_robust["eligible_sra",1]
se_z   <- fs_robust["eligible_sra",2]

kp_F <- (beta_z / se_z)^2

# first stage

fs_F_inst <- (coef(first_stage)["eligible_sra"] /
              sqrt(vcov(first_stage)["eligible_sra","eligible_sra"]))^2

# wu hausman endogeneity
df$res_fs <- resid(first_stage)

hausman_test1 <- lm(result_ant ~ long_retired + res_fs, data = df)
hausman_test2 <- lm(result_sdt ~ long_retired + res_fs, data = df)

wu1 <- coeftest(
  hausman_test1,
  vcov = vcovHC(hausman_test1, type="HC1")
)["res_fs","t value"]^2

wu2 <- coeftest(
  hausman_test2,
  vcov = vcovHC(hausman_test2, type="HC1")
)["res_fs","t value"]^2

# other statistics
#N <- nobs(m_iv)
mean_y1 <- mean(df$result_ant, na.rm = TRUE)
mean_y2 <- mean(df$result_sdt, na.rm = TRUE)
```



```{r list}
models <- list(

  "ANT" = ols_test1,
  "SDT" = ols_test2,

  "ANT" = rf_test1,
  "SDT" = rf_test2,

  "ANT" = iv_test1,
  "SDT" = iv_test2
)

```



```{r rows}
extra_rows <- data.frame(

  term = c(
    "First-stage F",
    "Kleibergen-Paap Wald F",
    "Wu-Hausman",
    "Mean dep. var."
  ),

  `OLS test1` = c("", "", "", round(mean_y1,3)),
  `OLS test2` = c("", "", "", round(mean_y2,3)),

  `RF test1` = c("", "", "", ""),
  `RF test2` = c("", "", "", ""),

  `2SLS test1` = c(
    round(fs_F_inst,2),
    round(kp_F,2),
    round(wu1,2),
    ""
  ),

  `2SLS test2` = c(
    round(fs_F_inst,2),
    round(kp_F,2),
    round(wu2,2),
    ""
  )
)
```


```{r sum}
modelsummary(

  models,

  vcov = vcov_list,

  statistic = "({std.error})",

  stars = c('*'=0.1,'**'=0.05,'***'=0.01),

  coef_rename = c(
    "D" = "Treatment",
    "D_hat" = "Treatment",
    "Z" = "Cutoff indicator"
  ),

  gof_omit = "AIC|BIC|Log|Adj",

  add_rows = extra_rows

)
```



```{r tab}
tab <- tab |>
  border_remove() |>
  hline_top(border    = fp_border(width = 1.5), part = "header") |>
  hline_bottom(border = fp_border(width = 1.5), part = "header") |>
  hline_bottom(border = fp_border(width = 1.5), part = "body") |>
  add_header_row(
    values    = c("", "OLS", "RF", "2SLS"),
    colwidths = c(1, 2, 2, 2)
  ) |>
  hline_top(border = fp_border(width = 1.5), part = "header") |>
  align(i = 1, align = "center", part = "header") |>
  align(i = 2, align = "center", part = "header") |>
  align(align = "center", part = "body") |>
  align(j = 1, align = "left", part = "all") |>
  font(fontname = "Times New Roman", part = "all") |>
  fontsize(size = 10, part = "all") |>
  add_footer_lines("Robust standard errors in parentheses. ANT = Result of Animal Naming Test, SDT = Result of Symbol Digit Test
                    long_retired	= Dummy indicator for being retired for more than one year, 
                    eligible_sra = Dummy indicator showing eligibility for statutory retirement age. 
                    All models are estimated without control variables.                   
                   * p<0.1, ** p<0.05, *** p<0.01.") |>
  font(fontname = "Times New Roman", part = "footer") |>
  fontsize(size = 9, part = "footer") |>
  # Spaltenbreiten manuell setzen statt autofit()
  width(j = 1, width = 2.0) |>   # Variablenspalte
  width(j = 2:7, width = 1.0)    # Datenspalten

doc <- read_docx() |> body_add_flextable(tab)
print(doc, target = "table_ols_rd_iv.docx")
```


## Comparing Models for ERA: Retirement on Cognition

```{r prep}

df <- cog_test_sgl %>% select(result_ant, result_sdt, long_retired, eligible_sra, eligible_early)


# OLS
ols_test1 <- lm(result_ant ~ long_retired, data = df) 
ols_test2 <- lm(result_sdt ~ long_retired, data = df)

# Reduced form
rf_test1 <- lm(result_ant ~ eligible_early, data = df)
rf_test2 <- lm(result_sdt ~ eligible_early, data = df)

# First stage
first_stage <- lm(long_retired ~ eligible_early, data = df)
df <- df[rownames(first_stage$model), ]
df$D_hat <- predict(first_stage)


# second stage
iv_test1 <- lm(result_ant ~ D_hat, data = df)
iv_test2 <- lm(result_sdt ~ D_hat, data = df)


vcov_list <- list(
  vcovHC(ols_test1, type = "HC1"),
  vcovHC(ols_test2, type = "HC1"),
  vcovHC(rf_test1, type = "HC1"),
  vcovHC(rf_test2, type = "HC1"),
  vcovHC(iv_test1, type = "HC1"),
  vcovHC(iv_test2, type = "HC1")
)
```

```{r coeff}
# kleibergen paap
fs_robust <- coeftest(first_stage, vcov = vcovHC(first_stage, type="HC1"))

beta_z <- fs_robust["eligible_early",1]
se_z   <- fs_robust["eligible_early",2]

kp_F <- (beta_z / se_z)^2

# first stage

fs_F_inst <- (coef(first_stage)["eligible_early"] /
              sqrt(vcov(first_stage)["eligible_early","eligible_early"]))^2

# wu hausman endogeneity
df$res_fs <- resid(first_stage)

hausman_test1 <- lm(result_ant ~ long_retired + res_fs, data = df)
hausman_test2 <- lm(result_sdt ~ long_retired + res_fs, data = df)

wu1 <- coeftest(
  hausman_test1,
  vcov = vcovHC(hausman_test1, type="HC1")
)["res_fs","t value"]^2

wu2 <- coeftest(
  hausman_test2,
  vcov = vcovHC(hausman_test2, type="HC1")
)["res_fs","t value"]^2

# other statistics
#N <- nobs(m_iv)
mean_y1 <- mean(df$result_ant, na.rm = TRUE)
mean_y2 <- mean(df$result_sdt, na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r list}
models <- list(

  "ANT" = ols_test1,
  "SDT" = ols_test2,

  "ANT" = rf_test1,
  "SDT" = rf_test2,

  "ANT" = iv_test1,
  "SDT" = iv_test2
)

```



```{r rows}
extra_rows <- data.frame(

  term = c(
    "First-stage F",
    "Kleibergen-Paap Wald F",
    "Wu-Hausman",
    "Mean dep. var."
  ),

  `OLS test1` = c("", "", "", round(mean_y1,3)),
  `OLS test2` = c("", "", "", round(mean_y2,3)),

  `RF test1` = c("", "", "", ""),
  `RF test2` = c("", "", "", ""),

  `2SLS test1` = c(
    round(fs_F_inst,2),
    round(kp_F,2),
    round(wu1,2),
    ""
  ),

  `2SLS test2` = c(
    round(fs_F_inst,2),
    round(kp_F,2),
    round(wu2,2),
    ""
  )
)
```


```{r sum}
tab_era <-modelsummary(

  models,

  vcov = vcov_list,

  statistic = "({std.error})",

  stars = c('*'=0.1,'**'=0.05,'***'=0.01),

  coef_rename = c(
    "D" = "Treatment",
    "D_hat" = "Treatment",
    "Z" = "Cutoff indicator"
  ),

  gof_omit = "AIC|BIC|Log|Adj",

  add_rows = extra_rows, 
  
  output = "flextable"

)
```


```{r tab}
tab_era <- tab_era |>
  border_remove() |>
  hline_top(border    = fp_border(width = 1.5), part = "header") |>
  hline_bottom(border = fp_border(width = 1.5), part = "header") |>
  hline_bottom(border = fp_border(width = 1.5), part = "body") |>
  add_header_row(
    values    = c("", "OLS", "RF", "2SLS"),
    colwidths = c(1, 2, 2, 2)
  ) |>
  hline_top(border = fp_border(width = 1.5), part = "header") |>
  align(i = 1, align = "center", part = "header") |>
  align(i = 2, align = "center", part = "header") |>
  align(align = "center", part = "body") |>
  align(j = 1, align = "left", part = "all") |>
  font(fontname = "Times New Roman", part = "all") |>
  fontsize(size = 10, part = "all") |>
  add_footer_lines("Robust standard errors in parentheses. ANT = Result of Animal Naming Test, SDT = Result of Symbol Digit Test
                    long_retired	= Dummy indicator for being retired for more than one year, 
                    eligible_early = Dummy indicator showing eligibility for early retirement age. 
                    All models are estimated without control variables.                   
                   * p<0.1, ** p<0.05, *** p<0.01.") |>
  font(fontname = "Times New Roman", part = "footer") |>
  fontsize(size = 9, part = "footer") |>
  # Spaltenbreiten manuell setzen statt autofit()
  width(j = 1, width = 2.0) |>   # Variablenspalte
  width(j = 2:7, width = 1.0)    # Datenspalten

doc <- read_docx() |> body_add_flextable(tab_era)

print(doc, target = "table_ols_rd_iv_era.docx")
```


## RD Mediation analysis 


```{r}

coef_labels <- c(
  "retired"             = "Retired",
  "eligible_sra"        = "Eligible SRA",
  "sra_dist"            = "Age (centered)",
  "eligible_sra:sra_dist" = "Eligible SRA × Age",
  "sex"                 = "Gender",
  "edu_time"            = "Education (yrs)",
  "manual_worker"       = "Blue-collar Work",
  "married"             = "Married",
  "hrs_chores_weekd"    = "Hrs Chores",
  "hrs_childcare_weekd" = "Hrs Childcare",
  "hrs_edu_weekd"       = "Hrs Education",
  "hrs_repair_weekd"    = "Hrs Repairs",
  "frq_classics"        = "Freq. Classics",
  "frq_cindisc"         = "Freq. Cinema/Disco"
)

# Rows to report (in order) — factor(syear) dummies excluded
report_vars <- c(
  "retired",
  "eligible_sra",
  "sra_dist",
  "eligible_sra:sra_dist",
  "sex",
  "edu_time",
  "manual_worker",
  "married",
  "hrs_chores_weekd",
  "hrs_childcare_weekd",
  "hrs_edu_weekd",
  "hrs_repair_weekd",
  "frq_classics",
  "frq_cindisc"
)


base_controls <- "retired + eligible_sra + eligible_sra:sra_dist + sra_dist +
                   factor(syear) + sex + edu_time + manual_worker + married"

mediators <- "+ hrs_chores_weekd + hrs_childcare_weekd + hrs_edu_weekd +
               hrs_repair_weekd + frq_classics + frq_cindisc"

f_m1_ant <- as.formula(paste("result_ant ~", base_controls))
f_m2_ant <- as.formula(paste("result_ant ~", base_controls, mediators))
f_m1_sdt <- as.formula(paste("result_sdt ~", base_controls))
f_m2_sdt <- as.formula(paste("result_sdt ~", base_controls, mediators))


cog_test_sgl$weight_sra <- pmax(0,1 - abs(cog_test_sgl$sra_dist) / 5)


fit_model <- function(formula, df) {
  tryCatch(
    lm(formula, data = df, weights = df$weight_sra),
    error = function(e) {
      cat("Fehler:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
      NULL
    }
  )
}

m1_ant <- fit_model(f_m1_ant, cog_test_sgl)
m2_ant <- fit_model(f_m2_ant, cog_test_sgl)
m1_sdt <- fit_model(f_m1_sdt, cog_test_sgl)
m2_sdt <- fit_model(f_m2_sdt, cog_test_sgl)


extract_coefs <- function(mod) {
  if (is.null(mod)) return(NULL)
  res <- tryCatch(
    coeftest(mod, vcov = vcovHC(mod, type = "HC1")),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  res
}

res_m1_ant <- extract_coefs(m1_ant)
res_m2_ant <- extract_coefs(m2_ant)
res_m1_sdt <- extract_coefs(m1_sdt)
res_m2_sdt <- extract_coefs(m2_sdt)


fmt_coef <- function(res, varname) {
  if (is.null(res)) return(list(coef = "—", se = ""))
  rn  <- rownames(res)
  idx <- which(rn == varname)
  if (length(idx) == 0) return(list(coef = "", se = ""))

  b  <- res[idx, 1]
  se <- res[idx, 2]
  p  <- res[idx, 4]
  stars <- ifelse(p < 0.01, "***",
           ifelse(p < 0.05, "**",
           ifelse(p < 0.1,  "*", "")))

  list(
    coef = paste0(round(b, 3), stars),
    se   = paste0("(", round(se, 3), ")")
  )
}


# Two rows per variable: coefficient + SE
rows <- list()

for (v in report_vars) {

  label <- coef_labels[v]

  c1 <- fmt_coef(res_m1_ant, v)
  c2 <- fmt_coef(res_m2_ant, v)
  c3 <- fmt_coef(res_m1_sdt, v)
  c4 <- fmt_coef(res_m2_sdt, v)

  all_empty <- all(c(c1$coef, c2$coef, c3$coef, c4$coef) == "")
  if (all_empty) next

  # Coefficient row
  rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
    term = label,
    ant_m1 = c1$coef,
    ant_m2 = c2$coef,
    sdt_m1 = c3$coef,
    sdt_m2 = c4$coef,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  # SE row
  rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
    term   = "",
    ant_m1 = c1$se,
    ant_m2 = c2$se,
    sdt_m1 = c3$se,
    sdt_m2 = c4$se,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# Observations row
n_row <- data.frame(
  term   = "Observations",
  ant_m1 = ifelse(!is.null(m1_ant), formatC(nobs(m1_ant), format = "d", big.mark = ","), "—"),
  ant_m2 = ifelse(!is.null(m2_ant), formatC(nobs(m2_ant), format = "d", big.mark = ","), "—"),
  sdt_m1 = ifelse(!is.null(m1_sdt), formatC(nobs(m1_sdt), format = "d", big.mark = ","), "—"),
  sdt_m2 = ifelse(!is.null(m2_sdt), formatC(nobs(m2_sdt), format = "d", big.mark = ","), "—"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Year FE indicator row
fe_row <- data.frame(
  term   = "Year FE",
  ant_m1 = "Yes", ant_m2 = "Yes",
  sdt_m1 = "Yes", sdt_m2 = "Yes",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Mediators indicator row
med_row <- data.frame(
  term   = "Mediators",
  ant_m1 = "No",  ant_m2 = "Yes",
  sdt_m1 = "No",  sdt_m2 = "Yes",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

df_table <- do.call(rbind, rows)
df_table <- rbind(df_table, fe_row, med_row, n_row)

# check
#print(df_table)

n_coef_rows  <- nrow(df_table) - 3          # all except last 3 stat rows
se_rows      <- which(df_table$term == "")   # SE rows (empty term)
stat_rows    <- (nrow(df_table) - 2):nrow(df_table)  # Year FE, Mediators, N
mediator_start <- which(df_table$term == coef_labels["hrs_chores_weekd"])

mediator_rows <- if (length(mediator_start) > 0) {
  mediator_start:min(mediator_start + 11, n_coef_rows)
} else integer(0)

term_w <- 1800
col_w  <- floor((9026 - term_w) / 4)

ft <- flextable(df_table) %>%

  # Top header: outcome groups
  add_header_row(
    values    = c("", "ANT", "SDT"),
    colwidths = c(1, 2, 2)
  ) %>%

  # Column labels
  set_header_labels(
    term   = "",
    ant_m1 = "Model 1",
    ant_m2 = "Model 2",
    sdt_m1 = "Model 1",
    sdt_m2 = "Model 2"
  ) %>%

  theme_booktabs() %>%
  font(fontname = "Times New Roman", part = "all") %>%
  fontsize(size = 9,  part = "body") %>%
  fontsize(size = 10, part = "header") %>%

  align(align = "center", part = "header") %>%
  align(j = 1, align = "left",   part = "body") %>%
  align(j = 2:5, align = "center", part = "body") %>%
  bold(i = 1:2, part = "header") %>%
  color(i = se_rows, color = "#555555", part = "body") %>%
  fontsize(i = se_rows, size = 8, part = "body") %>%
  bg(i = stat_rows, bg = "#F5F5F5", part = "body") %>%
  italic(i = stat_rows, part = "body") %>%
  bg(i = mediator_rows, bg = "#EEF4FB", part = "body") %>%
  hline(
    i      = min(stat_rows) - 1,
    border = fp_border(color = "#888888", width = 0.75),
    part   = "body"
  ) %>%

  hline(
    i      = max(0, mediator_start - 1),
    border = fp_border(color = "#AAAAAA", width = 0.5),
    part   = "body"
  ) %>%

  width(j = 1, width = term_w / 1440) %>%
  width(j = 2:5, width = col_w / 1440) %>%

  # notes
  add_footer_lines(values = paste(
    "Notes: Robust standard errors (HC1) in parentheses.",
    "Model 1 = base RD specification with year fixed effects and sociodemographic controls.",
    "Model 2 = Model 1 plus significant mediators from mechanism analysis",
    "(hrs_chores_weekd, hrs_childcare_weekd, hrs_edu_weekd, hrs_repair_weekd,",
    "frq_classics, frq_cindisc).",
    "ANT = Animal Naming Test; SDT = Symbol Digit Test.",
    "Retired is instrumented by eligible_sra.",
    "* p<0.1, ** p<0.05, *** p<0.01."
  )) %>%
  font(fontname = "Times New Roman", part = "footer") %>%
  fontsize(size = 9, part = "footer") %>%
  italic(part = "footer")

doc <- read_docx() %>%
  body_add_par(
    "Table: Mediation Analysis — Effect of Retirement on Cognitive Outcomes",
    style = "heading 1"
  ) %>%
  body_add_flextable(ft)

print(doc, target = "mediation_analysis.docx")
cat("\nSaved: mediation_analysis.docx\n")

```
